name: Mark Hall

contactInfo.office: 100 E. Tyler St., Suite 300, Athens, TX 75751

bio: Mark Hall serves as the District Attorney for Henderson County, leading felony prosecutions in the Athens area. He works to uphold the law and protect the residents of Henderson County from crime.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent and drug-related crimes
Advocate for victims' rights in the criminal justice process
Improve case processing efficiency in the DA's office
Partner with law enforcement for community safety
Maintain public trust through transparency and accountability
